overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking from a covered neon-lit market walkway through a transition corridor into an open foggy plaza featuring a large glowing green pyramid structure. The character continues through the dystopian plaza past security checkpoints and approaches a massive building covered in dense holographic neon advertisements, ending with a dramatic upward pan revealing the building's facade.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit covered walkway toward a bright exit at the far end

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking ahead toward the exit light

entered.detail: metal industrial ceiling with square ventilation grates
glowing teal neon sign mounted on the left wall
rows of vendor stalls with various goods on display
red illuminated signage on the right side of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit covered market walkway with industrial metal ceilings. Green and red neon signs illuminate the sides where market stalls are set up. The camera follows a figure ahead as they move toward a bright exit visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor leading to open plaza

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open foggy cityscape
lighting shifts from dark artificial neon to bright foggy ambient light

agents.ego_description: walking out of the covered market area into the open plaza, following the character ahead

notable_agents.action: character in light-colored jacket walking ahead into the plaza

entered.detail: large pyramid structure with green neon edges and vertical laser beam shooting upward
traditional red paper lanterns hanging near the exit
distant dystopian buildings visible through heavy atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway through a gateway adorned with red paper lanterns, transitioning into a foggy open plaza. The massive green glowing pyramid structure becomes visible in the distance, emitting a bright vertical beam into the hazy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central pyramid monument and security checkpoint

events.description: camera turns right to reveal the security checkpoint with active spotlights
passing the security checkpoint with sweeping spotlight beams

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, passing the pyramid structure and approaching the security checkpoint

notable_agents.action: security guard standing near the checkpoint barriers

entered.detail: checkpoint structure with yellow illuminated vertical panels and sweeping spotlights
massive industrial building with red warning lights on top
thick black cables stretching across the plaza overhead

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the open foggy plaza, passing the green pyramid now on the left. A security checkpoint with bright yellow panels and sweeping spotlights dominates the right side, while massive industrial towers rise in the background. Overhead cables crisscross the hazy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial building facade with dense holographic advertisements

events.description: camera pans upward to reveal the full height of the neon-covered building
approaching the base of the building with prominent 'Below Deck' signage

agents.ego_description: approaching the building and looking up at the dense neon signage covering the facade

entered.detail: tall building completely covered in holographic advertisements and neon signs
large teal neon sign reading 'BELOW DECK' with portrait graphic
circular red neon sign with spiral pattern for gun shop

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive building facade plastered with dense neon advertisements and holographic displays. The camera pans upward to reveal the 'Below Deck' sign and countless other glowing billboards covering the building's surface, creating a overwhelming display of cyberpunk commercial signage against the foggy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit market walkway into a vast, foggy dystopian plaza dominated by towering commercial architecture. It begins by following a figure through a dimly lit corridor under industrial metal ceilings, where red and green neon signs illuminate the surrounding market stalls. As the character passes through a gateway adorned with red paper lanterns, the scene opens into a hazy plaza where a massive green glowing pyramid emits a bright vertical beam into the night sky. The camera then tracks past the pyramid and a security checkpoint with sweeping yellow spotlights, moving beneath a web of overhead cables and industrial towers. Finally, the movement leads toward a massive building facade plastered in holographic displays, ending with a dramatic upward pan that reveals the overwhelming glow of the Below Deck sign and countless neon billboards.
